CVE-2013-2002.title: Buffer overflow in X.org libXt 1.1.3 and earlier allows X servers ...
CVE-2013-2002.description: Buffer overflow in X.org libXt 1.1.3 and earlier allows X servers to cause a denial of service (crash) and possibly execute arbitrary code via crafted length or index values to the _XtResourceConfigurationEH function.

CVE-2013-2005.title: X.org libXt 1.1.3 and earlier does not check the return value of  ...
CVE-2013-2005.description: X.org libXt 1.1.3 and earlier does not check the return value of the XGetWindowProperty function, which allows X servers to trigger use of an uninitialized pointer and memory corruption via vectors related to the (1) ReqCleanup, (2) HandleSelectionEvents, (3) ReqTimedOut, (4) HandleNormal, and (5) HandleSelectionReplies functions.
